components.descriptionText: Vibration sensors report minor resonance at cruise RPM. Recommend inspection.
All hydraulic pressures and response times are nominal.
FADEC integration fault — thrust lever position signal lost on engine 2. Aircraft non-mission capable.
Minor play detected in aileron linkage.
Minor friction increase noted in throttle quadrant. Operational but schedule inspection within 30 days.
Thrust lever position sensor failure detected on engine 3 channel. Aircraft grounded pending FADEC unit replacement.
Thrust lever assembly nominal. All FADEC inputs within tolerance.
Intermittent stiction on engine 4 thrust lever. Manual override force marginally above limits.
Throttle control unit healthy. No anomalies detected.
Pressure trending low on one circuit.
FADEC telemetry intermittency on engine 1 throttle channel. Monitor and inspect at next opportunity.
All throttle channels nominal. FADEC integration verified.
No faults. Throttle response within expected parameters.
Thrust lever assembly nominal. All FADEC inputs within tolerance.
Throttle control unit healthy. No anomalies detected.
Throttle friction adjustment mechanism showing wear. Recommend inspection within next scheduled servicing.
All throttle channels nominal. FADEC integration verified.
No faults. Throttle response within expected parameters.
Minor friction increase noted in throttle quadrant. Operational but schedule inspection within 30 days.
Thrust lever assembly nominal. All FADEC inputs within tolerance.
